header: 3-Column Feature Grid for polished feature narrative
subheadline: Frames product value with strong hierarchy, modern media support, and scannable details for every viewport.

items.title: Value spotlight
items.description: A sharp, production-minded 3-column feature grid using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so product teams can show value with clean, scannable sections.

items.title: Workflow advantage
items.description: Built to show the 3-column feature grid with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.

items.title: Capability layer
items.description: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this 3-column feature grid easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.
